regionName: Gale Crater and Mount Sharp (Aeolis Mons), Mars
elevationReference: planetary radius minus areoid (MOLA topography), meters
instrument: Mars Global Surveyor MOLA, MEGDR gridded topography, 128 px/deg
credit: NASA/JPL/GSFC (MOLA Science Team); PDS Geosciences Node
processing: 512x512 native-resolution crop centered on Gale Crater; linear normalization to 16-bit PNG, no resampling
